headline: WRB Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Premiums, Investment Income
summary: W.R. Berkley's Q2 results reflected premium growth, higher investment income and lower catastrophe losses, driving revenue growth and strong underwriting performance.

headline: The Progressive Corporation’s (PGR) EPS Growth Not Reflected in Share Price
summary: Giverny Capital Asset Management, LLC, an investment management company, recently published its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The model portfolio returned 13.70% this quarter, compared to the S&P 500’s 15.20% return. YTD, the portfolio gained 5.89%, while the index increased by 10.21%. The long-term link between stock […]
